root.name: Create slide after slide 3 with a table listing each experiment from slide 3 with columns for Researcher, Year, and Key Finding
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent created a slide after slide 3 with a table listing each experiment from slide 3, including required columns, table completeness, and extraneous changes.

children.name: New slide contains a table
children.description: Checks that the new slide contains a table element.

children.name: Table has correct columns: Researcher, Year, and Key Finding
children.description: Checks that the table on the new slide has columns with the required headers.

children.name: Table correctly lists each experiment from slide 3
children.description: Checks that each experiment listed on slide 3 appears as a row in the table on the new slide.

children.name: Table is filled (no empty required cells)
children.description: Checks that all required cells in the table (excluding header row) are filled with non-empty text.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides
children.description: Checks that only the intended new slide was added and no other slides were added, removed, or modified.

metadata.task: Create slide after slide 3 with a table listing each experiment from slide 3 with columns for Researcher, Year, and Key Finding
